name: Nutty Wild Rice Sausage Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Medium sized fresh mushrooms, sliced
Fresh ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare wild rice and long-grain rice according to package directions; toss together in a large bowl; set aside.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over high heat, cook sausage, stirring frequently until well browned. With a slotted spoon, remove sausage to the bowl with rice.
3. Add butter to drippings remaining in skillet; melt over medium heat. Add celery, mushrooms, onion and salt and pepper; cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until vegetables are tender.
4. Remove from heat; add vegetable mixture to rice mixture in bowl along with walnuts; toss well to mix. Makes 12 to 14 cups, just enough to stuff 12 to 14 pound turkey.
5. To toast walnuts: In a dry small skillet over very low heat, toast walnuts for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring frequently until golden brown. Cool before adding to stuffing.
